sections.paragraph:
- Original: τίς

- Transliteration: Tis

- Phonetic: tis

- Definition:

1. a certain, a certain one

2. some, some time, a while

- Origin: an enclitic indefinite pronoun

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: An enclitic indefinite pronoun; some or any person or object: - a (kind of) any (man thing thing at all) certain (thing) divers he (every) man one (X thing) ought + partly some (man -body -thing -what) (+ that no-) thing what (-soever) X wherewith whom [-soever] whose ([-soever]).
